title: tephrosia turpinii
intro: Tephrosia turpinii, also known as Wild Bean or Pigeon Bean, is a species of plant in the legume family native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Tephrosia turpinii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Tephrosia turpinii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
